programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: A Prayer For Compassion
programme.desc: An inspirational documentary about the importance of expanding your circle of compassion in life.

programme.title: The Human Experiment
programme.desc: A riveting documentary about chemicals being poured into our lives in various ways.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Lost In Java
programme.desc: A group of world-class professional big-wave surfers travel half-way around the world to attempt to surf a never before surfed 20 foot tube off the coast of Java in Indonesia. Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep119: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best powerboat racers as they compete head-to-head on the F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour where the toughest and most steely-nerved marine motorsport racers lock horns for the most prestigious title in powerboat racing..

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep802 Paddling the Petawawa River in Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: Host Ken Whiting embarks on a 5-day whitewater wilderness trip down the mighty Petawawa River in Ontario, Canada.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep105: Whale Sharks…Gentle Giants
programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, can reach nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With space age technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. In Mexico and Western Australia, whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse. Also featured is the remarkable story of the capture and transport of whale sharks to the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep103: Philippines
programme.desc: It started as an adventure to Cloud 9 for a surfing contest that turns into a cultural expedition and full-blown typhoon chasing surf trip to the northern regions and secret surf breaks of the Philippines. Creed McTaggart, Kaimana Jaquias, Mitch Parkinson, Soli Bailey and Noa Deane score some of the best waves imaginable in the crystal waters of Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Treasure Coast Fishing
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy fishes the offshore and inshore waters in the Sunrise City of Ft. Pierce, Florida. Joining him is Scott Locke of AmeraTrail and Captain Eric Davis.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep301: Wakeboarding at Moomba Masters, L30 Offshore Sailing, and Surf Games Highlights
programme.desc: Coming up this week, we return to Australia for another report from the Moomba Masters and this week we look at the wakeboarding. We'll take you to Italy with coverage of the L30 Offshore Mixed Europeans. But first we'll take you to Austria for highlights from the Surf Games.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Business Casual
programme.desc: Business Casual follows the Burton Snowboards crew and the Manboys as they enjoy the best part of the season in the Whistler area while Rusty Ockenden learns to operate a camera. The ManBoys crew encourages anyone who wants to get into the backcountry to take a first aid avalanche course with your whole crew. Be safe, have fun, learn from your mistakes - and learn from theirs. Featuring Jody Wachniak, Mark Sollors, Noah Cohen, Mikey Rencz, Matt Belzile, and Beau Bishop. Directed and edited by Rusty Ockenden

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. We will clean our equipment properly before feeding the horses and then we will be receiving Doctor Menegon, the voice for the Italian and International horse-riding competitions and introducing our special guest Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: Jumping International Le Saut Hermès - Highlights Prix du 24 Faubourg
programme.desc: After the famous Le Saut Hermès, the Prix du 24 Faubourg is also a competition with a classification of CSI5* but this time with point accumulation and against the clock. With obstacles from 1.50m to 1.60m, it is a big challenge with a progressive difficulty as rider and horse advance on the course. Relive the best moments of the Prix du 24 Faubourg in its 2019 edition.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez
programme.desc: We move on to sunny Saint Tropez to celebrate the fifth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022. Young talent Gilles Thomas has moved his way to second place in the standings, but Pieter Devos counts with years of experience and will not give up his first position so easily. Who will win Saint Tropez's GP?

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: The Dutch Masters 2021 Highlights
programme.desc: As the largest indoor show in the Netherlands, The Dutch Masters (Indoor Brabant Horse Show) has already stood for top-class equestrian sport for half a century. Together with the CHI Genève, CSIO Spruce Meadows Masters and the CHIO Aachen, the Dutch Masters is one of the four top events of the respected Rolex Grand Slam. The best riders in the world meet up every year in March in a bid to ride to victory in the legendary Brabanthallen. The first World Cup Final of showjumping was staged in this venue for the first time in 1994, and since prestigious competitions and more finals have taken place in one of the four pillars of showjumping and dressage. Intense competitions meet exquisite entertainment amid the unique atmosphere of the Dutch Masters. You can now watch the highlights of the competition on Horse TV.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Nature Walks
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the calming beauty of Hawaii’s Tropical Botanical Garden, where diverse tropical flora and the gentle sounds of nature transport you to a peaceful, serene world.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: While there are many ways to spend time, nothing compares to the calming effect of watching a starry sky. Stand on a hilltop, admire the Milky Way, and experience peaceful serenity.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: Enjoy a peaceful night’s sleep with a calming video of Lake Minnewanka in Banff National Park. The soothing sounds of gentle waves and the full moon create a serene atmosphere, perfect for relaxation and restful sleep.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The tuning company MTM went to work on Audi's already super-powerful S8 luxury sedan and created the S8 Talladega R. Alpina's B6 Biturbo Gran Coupe easily beats its BMW counterpart and makes the road vibrate.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Many of today's supercars rely on hybrid technology or even drive purely electrically. We take a look at the sports cars of the future and try to get an insight into the latest and planned technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik - Orebic
programme.desc: We begin our journey inside Sail-Ho at the most beautiful and magical old city: Dubrovnik. Home to many famous TV series due to its historical and beautiful landscape, we are ready to sail around the Elafiti islands and introduce you to the top quality wines of Pelješac peninsula.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Antisocial Behaviour
programme.desc: Jakob Kelser is a man with a horrific, troubled past. Having been failed by society and plagued by a gruesome childhood memory, he is forced to live alone in the unholy hell of God's making.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E03 - Kia Under the Bering Sea
programme.desc: Kia dredges for gold on the bottom of the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E41 - Fergie The Downfall Of A Modern Duchess
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E06 - Heaven's Gate

programme.title: The Strange love of Martha Ivers

programme.title: His Girl Friday

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God’s not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He’s working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Keep It In Context
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it’s easy to lose perspective. But what if God’s already provided the help you’ve been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn’t proof you’re losing, it’s evidence that you’re carrying something worth fighting for.

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you’ve started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It’s time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies behind, because the Word says otherwise.

programme.title: Begin With Amen
programme.desc: There are seasons and situations we write off — God could never use that. But Jesus already knew about it when He found you, and He’s got a plan to redeem it. You might be wondering how, because you can’t see it yet. This sermon is an invitation to believe. If you want to know what God can do through your life, follow and find out.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pasillos se rumora que Max apadrina a Camila a cambio de sexo. Un disparo mantiene a Javier sin reacciones. Se enfrentan Camila y Marcelina, siempre por el asunto de su madre y luego Camila decide disculparse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La misteriosa mujer que nombra Marcelina es una incógnita para Camila y Max piensan que están más cerca de encontrarla. Continúa la guerra entre las familias López y Aragón. Max y Camila visitan el orfanato.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Regresa Sebastían como sacerdote y esto desilusiona a Amelia. Camila insiste en que Rosa Blanco puede ser su mamá, pero Max no quiere que se haga ilusiones para que no sufra.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
